turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Visiting a Bank and Asking for Help with Banking Services

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I want to practise requesting help at a local bank branch or through customer service. You are a bank staff member or customer service officer. I will play the role of the customer. Please create a realistic, formal, and polite conversation, just like an interaction at an Australian bank.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Certainly. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hello.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hello there! What

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'd like to open a bank account.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely. Is this going to be a personal account, or do you have a business in mind?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Personal account please, and do I need an appointment or can I just come in today?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, a personal account is straightforward. You can actually just walk in today—no appointment needed. Now, may I ask if you have a form of ID with you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Actually, I'm on my student visa, so what type of ID do I have to bring?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, as a student visa holder, you can just bring your passport and your visa details. That'll do perfectly. And do you already have a local address here that we can use?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, of course. So, the address of my school dormitory will be okay?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that’s just fine. We can definitely use your dorm address for now. And is there a particular type of account you’re interested in, like a student account or just a standard savings account?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What kind of account can I open?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We do have a special student account that has no monthly fees and a few perks for students. Or if you prefer, you can just go with a standard savings account. Which one would you like to go with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I'd like to both of them.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s absolutely doable. We can set you up with both a student account and a standard savings. Now, do you have an initial amount in mind that you’d like to deposit to open these accounts?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Maybe I can put later, and what's the difference between them.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! So, basically, the student account is tailored for students, meaning it has no monthly fees and some student-friendly benefits. The standard savings account is more general, and it's good if you want to just put money aside and earn a little bit of interest. Does that help, or is there anything else you’d like to know about them?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Got it. So, can I make a debit card with one of those accounts?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, yes. We can issue you a debit card with the student account so you can access your funds easily. Now, do you have any preferred daily limit for withdrawals that you'd like me to note down for you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “A $500 limit, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, that's easy enough. We'll set a $500 daily limit on your debit card. And I think we have everything we need. We'll just get the paperwork started. Anything else you'd like to ask before we proceed?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Can I set up online banking at the same time so that I can access through my application?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we can do that for you right away. We’ll just link your accounts to online banking so you can use the app from the start. And once we finish, you'll get your login details. Anything else on your mind before we wrap up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And actually, I change my password monthly, so what if I forget my password?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure thing! If you do forget your password, you can easily reset it through the app or just give us a quick call. We'll help you out. So, let's get everything set up for you now.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And how much is the monthly fee for the saving account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Right now, the standard savings account has no monthly fee at all, so you won’t have to worry about that. We try to keep it nice and simple. Anything else you'd like to clarify before we finalize everything?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And also, I'm gonna work as soon as possible, so do you guys serve any superannuation account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, we do. We can help you set up a superannuation account as well to get you ready for when you start working. So if you'd like, we can include that in today’s setup. Just let me know if that sounds good to you?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Yes, please. And do I need GFM for it?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! We'll go ahead and include that for you as well. And no worries, you don't need a tax file number immediately, but it's good to have it handy when you do start earning. So let's get all these things finalized for you, and you'll be all set.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Uh, for the address, do I need proof for that?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely. Usually, just something like a letter from your school or a dorm confirmation will work as proof of address. So if you have anything like that, just bring it along. And with that, we'll have everything we need. Anything else on your mind before we finish up?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I think I'm gonna move to another city within a month.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right, no problem at all. If you do move, you can easily update your address with us online or in any branch. So just let us know when that happens. And I think we're all set here. Thanks for letting me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And actually, I'm an international student, so how do I check if my international transfers are enabled on my account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure! As an international student, we can definitely enable international transfers on your account. Once everything's set up, you'll see that option in your online banking and you can manage it from there. Anything else you're curious about?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “assuming I can access international transfer by online or application.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Exactly, you've got it. You can do it all right from the app or online banking. It's pretty straightforward. So I think we've got everything covered for you now. If there's nothing else, we're all set!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “And I think, um, in...”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: All right! So it

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Two years?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it! Well, it sounds like you've got a good plan ahead. We'll make sure everything's set up smoothly for you for the time you're here. And

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “I mean, in two years, I'm going to go back to my country, so how do I close my account after I'll be back?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Sure, I understand.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Which you might come see.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that makes sense. When you're ready to head back home in a couple of years, you can just let us know and we can close your account either in person or even online. So it's really simple. If there's anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Could you let me know the interest of the saving account?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely. Right now, the savings account has a variable interest rate, which is currently around 1.5% per annum. It can change a bit over time, but that's the current rate. If that sounds good, then we're all set to go. Anything else you need?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “That sounds perfect. Thank you so much.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! I'm glad we could get everything sorted out for you. If you need anything else, just let us know. Have a great day!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Have a good one.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You too! Take care, and thanks for stopping by.
